title: ENGLISH AS A SECOND LANGUAGE CLASSES - 211info
text: GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION ENGLISH AS A SECOND LANGUAGE CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers English as a Second Language (ESL) classes to anyone who wishes to learn or improve their English skills. Also provides assistance to students preparing for their naturalization interview. 1943 SE Sixth Avenue Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by location Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information or to find class information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Saturday 9am-9pm, Sunday 10am-8pm Services: English as a Second Language Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - CITIZENSHIP PREPARATION EMPLOYMENT - CAREER CENTER EMPLOYMENT - JOB CONNECTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
